evals.prompt: Write a Python script to extract all text from a multi-page PDF file and save it to a text file.
evals.expected_output: A Python script using pypdf or pdfplumber for text extraction
expectations: Uses pypdf (PdfReader) or pdfplumber for extraction
Iterates over all pages in the PDF
Saves extracted text to a .txt file
Handles the case where a PDF has no extractable text

evals.prompt: Merge three PDF files (report1.pdf, report2.pdf, report3.pdf) into a single combined.pdf file.
evals.expected_output: A script using pypdf PdfWriter/PdfMerger to merge PDFs
expectations: Uses pypdf PdfWriter or PdfMerger (not deprecated PyPDF2)
Writes a single merged output file
References the correct library methods from the skill
